visual_description: Two men in business attire stand in an office-like setting with glass partitions; one has his arms crossed and gazes forward, while the other faces slightly away. A third man in a uniform with insignia is partially visible in the foreground, looking toward the right. The scene is dimly lit with fluorescent lighting, and a monitor displaying a timestamp is visible in the background.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone, with a moderate pace and pitch, and no noticeable prosody or non-speech sounds.
